description: Fol. 1 verso: List of names in two columns, accompanied by various sums. Fol. 2 verso: accounts of the elder Shalom Ṣughayyir. Fol. 2 recto: personal account for the week ending on Shabbat naso. (F. Niessen and A. Shivtiel, ed., Arabic and Judaeo-Arabic Manuscripts in the Cambridge Genizah Collections, 601) EMS
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
